{{Quote|Sir, this is Bagitt in Engine Central. The last drive motivator just went.|Bagitt to [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]|<ref name="The Last Command">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref>}}
'''Bagitt''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] technician in [[Engine Central]] of [[Nomad City]] on [[Nkllon/Legends|Nkllon]].

==Biography==
On the day of the [[destruction of Nomad City]], he reported to [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] the damage to drive motivators that the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] had done during their visit. He also attempted to repair the [[Life support/Legends|life support]] systems until the evacuation order was announced.

{{Char-stub}}
